body_transformation: The turtle shell now bears a cracked obsidian texture with molten gold seams glowing at the seams, while the pale blue underbelly shifts to charcoal black with ember-scaled patterns. The curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame-tipped structure with molten gold veins, and the rounded head's pointed ears gain heat-haze distortion around their edges. Short stubby legs now feature magma-cracked armor plating along the lower limbs, and the overall silhouette retains its low quadruped stance with a slight heat distortion around the body. The light blue coloration is replaced by deep crimson and burnt orange hues, but the structural shape of the head, shell, and limbs remains unchanged.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame with ember-scaled veins and flickering heat-haze.
